title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 640.405 - Interstate use of water, negotiation of interstate compacts, duties of department — general assembly and other agencies to be consulted
text:
640.405.  Interstate use of water, negotiation of interstate compacts, duties of department — general assembly and other agencies to be consulted. — The department shall represent and protect the interests of the state of Missouri in all matters pertaining to interstate use of water, including the negotiation of interstate compacts and agreements, subject to the approval of the general assembly.  Any department of state government affected by any compact or agreement shall be consulted prior to any final agreement.
(L. 1989 S.B. 112, et al. § 3)
